title: AssemblyMod
description: Add more convenience to your game
body:
## 🔎What can it do?
Since Minecraft's ChestBoat spawn requires crafting instead of directly holding a chest and right-clicking on the boat,so This mod was born.
(A similar feature has also been added for minecarts)

## ⌨️Specific operations
1. After holding the chest, right-click on the boat, and it becomes the chest boat.
2. After holding the material corresponding to the minecart variant, right-click to the minecart, and then it will become the corresponding minecart variant.
3. After holding the material corresponding to the rail variant, right-click to point the rail, and then it becomes the corresponding rail variant.
![Show](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/ZCtRJnsu/images/40111cee2a6d51c0448dcacbda45b8f5c411213b.png)

## ⚙️Impact on your game
1. It simplifies your game flow.
2. It makes the game more interesting.
3. Closer to reality.
